createWhaleProposal(address,uint256).details: This keeps vote attribution accurate because governor reads msg.sender.

executeAfterWhaleVote(uint256).details: Expected external step: whale calls IGovernor(governor).castVote(proposalId, 1).

params.amountPerProposal: Amount to drain in each proposal

params.treasuryDrainAmount: The amount to attempt stealing from treasury
params.whale: The address of the whale holder

_performWhaleAttack(address,uint256).notice: Internal function to perform the whale attack

createWhaleProposal(address,uint256).notice: Phase 1: create whale proposal only (whale must vote directly on governor).

executeAfterWhaleVote(uint256).notice: Phase 2: execute after whale externally casts vote on governor.

executeGradualDraining(address,uint256,u.notice: Simulates multiple whale proposals to gradually drain treasury

executeWhaleAttack(address,uint256).notice: Identifies a whale holder and simulates gradual governance capture

getAmountStolen().notice: Get amount stolen in the attack

getProfitabilityRatio().notice: Get profitability ratio (amount stolen / cost of attack) This attack has near-zero cost (attacker already has the whale position)

getWhaleVotingPercentage().notice: Get the whale's voting power percentage
